prompt_text:
### Demographics: 66-year-old Asian man

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 18 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes after hyperglycemia symptoms (polyuria, polydipsia, weight loss)
Current symptoms: Occasional fatigue and thirst with nocturia; no DKA/HHS signs; no severe hypoglycemia; Occasional GI side effects (nausea/loose stool)

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 3a (45-59)
Body mass index category: Overweight
Diabetic retinopathy
Diabetic Retinopathy
Rheumatoid Arthritis
Major Depressive Disorder
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 3a (45-59); HF (No); ASCVD (No); MASLD: Normal; BMI Category: Overweight
- Family history: No family history of type 2 diabetes (elicited)
- Social history: Never smoker; Alcohol 3-4 drinks/week (2-3 per sitting)

### Medication information
- Current medications: Metformin 1000mg twice daily; Empagliflozin 10mg once daily; Sitagliptin 100mg once daily; Sertraline (50 mg daily), Methotrexate (15 mg weekly), Losartan (50 mg daily), Finerenone (10 mg daily)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 69.2 kg; Height 170.9 cm; BMI 23.7 kg/m²; Blood pressure 144/85 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 7.1%; 9 months ago 7.8%; 6 months ago 8.2%; 3 months ago 7.7%; current 8.5%), FPG (12 months ago 187mg/dL; 9 months ago 192mg/dL; 6 months ago 224mg/dL; 3 months ago 207mg/dL; current 224mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 69.9kg; 9 months ago 69.8kg; 6 months ago 66.8kg; 3 months ago 67.3kg; current 69.2kg), Height (12 months ago 170.9cm; 9 months ago 170.9cm; 6 months ago 170.9cm; 3 months ago 170.9cm; current 170.9cm), BMI (12 months ago 24.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 24.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 23.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 23.0kg/m²; current 23.7kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 140mmHg; 9 months ago 139mmHg; 6 months ago 144mmHg; 3 months ago 144mmHg; current 144mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 82mmHg; 9 months ago 84mmHg; 6 months ago 82mmHg; 3 months ago 85mmHg; current 85mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 30U/L; 9 months ago 22U/L; 6 months ago 23U/L; 3 months ago 32U/L; current 28U/L), AST (12 months ago 18U/L; 9 months ago 11U/L; 6 months ago 11U/L; 3 months ago 12U/L; current 15U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 0.4mg/dL; 9 months ago 0.4mg/dL; 6 months ago 0.4mg/dL; 3 months ago 0.5mg/dL; current 0.5mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 54mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 56mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 56mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 52mL/min/1.73m²; current 53mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 191mg/g; 9 months ago 307mg/g; 6 months ago 228mg/g; 3 months ago 361mg/g; current 290mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 100mg/dL; 9 months ago 95mg/dL; 6 months ago 98mg/dL; 3 months ago 93mg/dL; current 96mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 58mg/dL; 9 months ago 55mg/dL; 6 months ago 59mg/dL; 3 months ago 55mg/dL; current 57mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 151mg/dL; 9 months ago 149mg/dL; 6 months ago 134mg/dL; 3 months ago 133mg/dL; current 142mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 12.6g/dL; 9 months ago 13.3g/dL; 6 months ago 13.3g/dL; 3 months ago 13.2g/dL; current 12.7g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Not measured (Current); fasting C-peptide Not measured (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Very poor adherence (estimated <50%); SMBG rarely performed; lifestyle control severely limited.
Financial context: Patient has standard insurance with moderate copays and a monthly medication budget of ≤ KRW 500,000.
